coverage: 100% of reachable node types across the 1-group, 24-node closure.
validation: The standalone Cube.010 user has exact authored topology and local bounds. Wave Texture bands and Rotate Vector fields reproduce the sloped vice-jaw flares that were absent from the passthrough fallback. All 10 evaluated faces are flat and unassigned, so authored mode uses Blender's neutral fallback rather than a filament or G-code surface. Cube.008 and vice plate reuse this root inside longer modifier stacks.

material.contract: Blender unassigned neutral surface on 10 flat faces
material.scope: Viewport material parity only; no slicer or G-code toolpath is present.
